questions.q: Who recently stated that AI-powered bug hunters have made the Linux security mailing list 'almost entirely unmanageable'?
options: Linus Torvalds
Richard Stallman
Tim Cook
Satya Nadella

questions.q: How did a LinkedIn user recently strike back against automated recruitment bots spamming their profile?
options: By hiding an AI prompt injection in their bio to force Olde English prose
By injecting SQL to delete the recruiter's account
By redirecting the bot to a continuous loop of CAPTCHAs
By setting their work experience to 100 years in the future
questions.correctText: By hiding an AI prompt injection in their bio to force Olde English prose

questions.q: What is the name of the new Windows zero-day privilege escalation exploit that provides attackers with SYSTEM access on fully patched systems?
options: MiniPlasma
WannaCry
BlueKeep
GhostToken

questions.q: What order did a South Korean court issue regarding the 2026 Samsung union strike?
options: The strike must not impact chip production volume
The strike must end within 24 hours
Strikers are banned from demonstrating near the headquarters
The union must pay a daily fine to the government
questions.correctText: The strike must not impact chip production volume

questions.q: How did China's new 1.54-exaflops 'LineShine' supercomputer bypass US GPU bans?
options: It is a CPU-only system using 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
It utilizes specialized quantum processors built by Alibaba
It connects millions of consumer gaming consoles in parallel
It relies entirely on analog optical computing chips
questions.correctText: It is a CPU-only system using 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
